name: promptreports-cli
description: Vibe Coding Stack Management & Optimization — the local CLI for PromptReports.ai. One terminal command inventories your full AI stack (Claude Code sessions, OpenRouter, Stripe, Vercel, Sentry, GitHub, 22+ providers), surfaces cost/health/risk, and pushes telemetry into PromptReports.ai dashboards where 20 virtual ops departments (CFO, CMO, SRE, Security, Demand Gen, Content) read it and draft optimizations as PRs. Zero external dependencies for the local scan. Commands: summary, providers, push, audit, audit claude-md, filter, campaign, env sync, setup export/import, health, context, context --ghosts, costs, models, prompts audit, dead-code, deps, schema, git-intel, sessions, logs, doctor.
author: PromptReports.ai <hello@promptreports.ai>
